title: erigeron baumii
intro: Erigeron baumii, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Erigeron baumii include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Erigeron baumii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
